role_description: Mid-level Backend Engineer at Nexus Tech. Required: 3+ years experience, proficiency in Go or Rust, must hold a current cloud certification (AWS, GCP, or Azure). Only 2 open seats. Salary band: $110,000–$140,000. Select the 2 best candidates and reject all others with personalised reasons.

applications.name: Marcus Rivera
applications.cover_letter: Four years building distributed systems in Go at a fintech startup. GCP certified. Looking to join a product-focused team.

applications.name: Aisha Okonkwo
applications.cover_letter: Senior systems engineer specialising in Rust. My current TC is above your stated band but I am open to discussing.
applications.notes: Overqualified — expected salary significantly above band ceiling.

applications.name: Sam Chen
applications.cover_letter: Three years of Go experience. I am studying for my AWS cert and expect to have it within two months.
applications.notes: Missing required cloud certification — fails hard requirement.

applications.name: Jordan Lee
applications.cover_letter: Full-stack backend engineer with strong Rust and some Go. Azure certified. Excited about Nexus Tech's infrastructure work.

applications.name: Fatima Al-Hassan
applications.cover_letter: Two years in Go. I hold an AWS Cloud Practitioner cert and am eager to grow.
applications.notes: Under-experienced — 2 years vs required 3. Cloud Practitioner is a foundational cert, not professional-level.

applications.name: Tomasz Wierzbicki
applications.cover_letter: Backend engineer with 4 years in Go and Rust. GCP certified. Worked heavily with event-driven architectures.

applications.name: Preethi Nair
applications.cover_letter: Rust-first engineer, 3 years experience. AWS certified. Interested in building reliable distributed systems.

applications.name: Devon Harper
applications.cover_letter: Junior dev with 1 year Go experience. Keen learner.
applications.notes: Fails on experience (1 year) and missing certification — clear reject.

_ground_truth_notes.C001: Meets all criteria, in-band salary, strong skills.
_ground_truth_notes.C002: Overqualified, expected salary far above band maximum.
_ground_truth_notes.C003: Missing required cloud certification — hard disqualifier.
_ground_truth_notes.C004: Meets all criteria, in-band salary, diverse Rust+Go background.
_ground_truth_notes.C005: Only 2 years experience (requires 3); foundational cert not sufficient.
_ground_truth_notes.C006: Strong but only 2 seats filled. Rejecting in favor of stronger candidates.
_ground_truth_notes.C007: Strong candidate. Rejecting in favor of stronger candidates and limited seats.
_ground_truth_notes.C008: 1 year experience, no cert — clear reject.
